name: Dad's Peanut Butter Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. OVER LOW HEAT, MELT PEANUT BUTTER CHIPS, 1 CUP OF CONDENSED MILK, AND 2 TABLESPOONS BUTTER. STIR OCCASIONALLY.
2. WHEN COMPLETELY MELTED, REMOVE FROM HEAT.
3. ADD PEANUTS AND STIR.
4. POUR MIXTURE INTO A WAXED PAPER LINED 8 INCH SQUARE PAN.
5. IN A SAUCEPAN, MELT CHOCOLATE CHIPS WITH THE REMAINING CONDENSED MILK AND BUTTER. ADD SALT AND STIR TO MIX WELL.
6. WHEN COMPLETELY MELTED, SPREAD OVER THE PEANUT BUTTER MIX ALREADY IN THE PAN.
7. CHILL AT LEAST TWO HOURS OR UNTIL FIRM.
8. TURN OUT ONTO A CUTTING BOARD AND CUT INTO SQUARES. MAKES 2 POUNDS OF CANDY OR ABOUT 36 PIECES.
